name: QA 821
description:
PCP QA Test No. 821

Exercise Linux PMDA memory metrics.



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.



The linux/meminfo-root-008.tgz is very large (close to 1 Mbyte)

so it has been tagged as a "big file" and is not in the source

tarball and so not packaged.  This test has been split ...

- by default the 008 data set is skipped

- with command line arguments of <seq> and <dataset> just that

<dataset> is run and this is used by the dual test qa/1663 to

exercise the 008 data set
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 821

Exercise Linux PMDA memory metrics.

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.

The linux/meminfo-root-008.tgz is very large (close to 1 Mbyte)

so it has been tagged as a "big file" and is not in the source

tarball and so not packaged. This test has been split ...

  • by default the 008 data set is skipped

  • with command line arguments of and just that

is run and this is used by the dual test qa/1663 to

exercise the 008 data set
